title: Gizmo's Fancy Armor
description: For those who want to see their skin!
body:
**Gizmo’s Fancy Armor** is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly resource pack that reimagines Minecraft’s armor look with a clean, minimalist style, letting more of your character’s skin show through while you play. It preserves the classic Minecraft aesthetic but with a subtle visual upgrade that blends seamlessly into your existing resource packs.

- **Minimal styled armor textures** that reduce visual bulk without losing clarity.

- **Full Vanilla look & feel**: Designed to match the game’s original art style.

- **Armor Trim Support**: Works with Minecraft’s armor trims so you can still suit up in style.

Whether you’re showcasing your skin, building immersive worlds, or just want a cleaner look in combat, Gizmo’s Fancy Armor gives you more character visibility without sacrificing style.
